title: Calibop
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Species |image=[[File:Ponc_Gavrisom_the_Calibop.jpg]] |name=Calibop |designation= |class= |subspecies= |races= |height=1.86 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor=Pale [[Color/Legends|blue]]''[[Specter of the Past]]'' |distinctions=*Avian *Mane *Prehensile wing tips *Talkative nature |lifespan= |origin= |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|Would sacrificing one life to prevent it have been such a bad bargain?''"
"''That is a question all beings eventually ask themselves. For those who wish to remain civilized, there can be only one answer.|Borsk Fey'lya and Ponc Gavrisom|}} '''Calibops''' were an avian [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] known during the times of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The species had manes and prehensile wingtips. They also had a reputation of being better with words than with acts, something that not even the Calibops themselves argued. A number of Calibops were seen in the galaxy, including [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Ponc Gavrisom]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], [[Sergeant-at-Arms/Legends|Sergeant at Arms]] [[Mif Kumas]] and a [[Unidentified Calibop Mandalorian|member]] of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett's]] [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]]. ==Biology and appearance== {{Quote|But Gavrisom would have a fit if I tried to leave right now.''"
"''That might make it worthwhile all by itself. I don't think I've ever seen Puffers throw a fit.|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|}} A Calibop was a tall''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' avian [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]]. At least one Calibop had pale [[Color/Legends|blue]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. A Calibop also had a mane of feathers that the individual could shake, sometimes indicating an easygoing criticism. A Calibop had a big beak that could be used to whinny in the species' equivalent to a sigh, or to expel sounds created in the depths of the Calibop's throat. A Calibop had a robust voice generated in the beak.''[[Vision of the Future]]'' Calibops had big wings that did not allow them to fly, but an individual could flutter them to increase his walking speed.''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' The wings could be folded either in front or behind the person, and were strong enough to be used in melee combat. The tips of the wings were prehensile like fingers. Calibops used these as fingers to press keys, or to flicker restlessly. Calibops also had tails that they could flicker in what was considered the Calibop version of a shrug. ==Society and culture== {{Quote|But there are many in the New Republic who believe that Calibops are skilled at words and nothing more. Perhaps the time for words has ended, and the time for action has arrived.|Ponc Gavrisom|}} The Calibops had a reputation for being particularly rhetorical, even if it detracted their skill for other activities seen as more active. The Calibops themselves were familiar with their stigma, but many of them believed that words were useful at certain times, even if only actions could be useful at other times. ==Calibops in the galaxy== {{Quote|He never seems to do anything but talk.''"
"''That's what Calibops are best at.|Han Solo and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|}} [[File:Calibop.jpg|thumb|left|Ponc Gavrisom, a Calibop]] The Calibops were among the many sentient species in the galactic community as of [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]]. A [[Human/Legends|Human]] from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] could shake hands with a Calibop. Another Calibop, [[Mif Kumas]], was [[Sergeant-at-Arms/Legends|Sergeant at Arms]] of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] from [[21 ABY/Legends|21 ABY]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' to [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], when the august body was dissolved. In [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]], a tall Calibop was seen among the [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]], also including [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]], gathered by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] in [[Caluula Station]], soon before it was [[Battle of Caluula|assaulted]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaders. ==Behind the scenes== Calibops first appeared in the [[1997]] novel ''[[Specter of the Past]]'', written by [[Timothy Zahn]]. The species was first pictured in [[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']].[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Calibops}} *''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' *[[Millennium Falcon (novel)|''Millennium Falcon'']] {{Ab|Millennium Falcon (audiobook)}} ==Sources== *[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] {{1stp}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Avian and airborne sentient species]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Calibops]] }}
